name: LaraDashboard
myRole: I designed and developed the entire dashboard, including user management, role-based access control, and content management features. I also implemented the frontend using Tailwind CSS and Livewire for a responsive and interactive user experience. The full CRM is build by me, and I am responsible for maintaining and updating the project regularly to ensure it meets the needs of users and stays up-to-date with the latest Laravel features and best practices.

name: ElementsKit
myRole: Fix bugs, add new features, and maintain the plugin to ensure it remains compatible with the latest version of Elementor and WordPress. I also collaborate with the development team to implement new widgets and extensions based on user feedback and market trends. Additionally, I am responsible for optimizing the plugin's performance and ensuring it provides a seamless user experience for our customers.
